title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.465 - Money paid beneficiaries only on warrant
text:
87.465.  Money paid beneficiaries only on warrant. — All moneys ordered to be paid from said pension funds to any person or persons shall be paid by the treasurer of the board of trustees only upon warrants signed by the president of said board and countersigned by the secretary thereof, and no warrant shall be drawn except by order of the board, duly entered on the records of the proceedings of the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 9538) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8973; 1919 § 9074; 1909 § 9899
